info.title: Ecomapp Main-buildTime
info.description: Ecomapp is a comprehensive e-commerce platform offering seamless shopping experience with robust backend integration and user-friendly interfaces.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management including listing, addition, and update of products.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints handling order creation, tracking, and management.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User account management, authentication, and profile related operations.

tags.name: payments
tags.description: Payment processing, billing, and transaction status endpoints.

get.summary: Retrieve the current cart for a specified user
get.description: Fetches the cart contents for the user identified by userId. Returns the list of cart items and their quantities, allowing the client to display the current state of the user's shopping cart.

200.description: Successful retrieval of the user's cart

400.description: Bad request due to invalid user identifier

example.message: The userId provided is invalid or malformed.

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving cart

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's cart
post.description: Adds a specific item to the shopping cart of the user identified by userId. The request body must specify the item details such as product ID and quantity. Returns the updated cart contents.

requestBody.description: Item to be added to the user's cart

200.description: Item successfully added and cart updated

400.description: Bad request due to invalid input data

example.message: The item details provided are invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Product ID is required and must be a valid product.

500.description: Internal server error while adding item to cart

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order on behalf of the user
post.description: Creates a new order for the user identified by userId using the current cart contents or specified order details. Returns an order confirmation with order ID and summary.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid user or order data

example.message: The order request is invalid or missing required information.

details.issue: User ID is invalid or not found.

example.message: The user or associated cart could not be found.

details.issue: No cart exists for the specified user.

500.description: Internal server error while placing order

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific order
get.description: Fetches detailed information about the order identified by orderId, including items, status, and shipping information.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid order identifier

example.message: The provided orderId is invalid or malformed.
The requested order does not exist.

details.issue: No order exists with the specified ID.

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving order

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts a payment process with the required payment details provided in the request body. Returns payment confirmation and status.

requestBody.description: Payment details required to initiate a payment

example.message: Required payment details are missing or invalid.

details.issue: Card number is invalid or missing.

example.message: Payment authorization failed or required funds not available.

500.description: Internal server error during payment initiation

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Receive and process payment webhook events sent by the payment gateway. The request body contains event data for a payment transaction, which will be validated and processed. Returns a response indicating the processing result.

requestBody.description: Payment webhook event payload containing details of the payment status and metadata.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid webhook payload

example.message: The webhook payload is malformed or missing required fields.

402.description: Payment required or failed payment processing

example.message: The payment processing failed or requires additional action.

500.description: Internal server error while processing webhook

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Create and register a new product in the system catalog. The request body contains the detailed product information including name, description, price, and inventory. Returns the created product details.

requestBody.description: Product details for creating a new product in the catalog.

example.name: Wireless Mouse Pro
example.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI and long battery life.

example.message: The product details provided are invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the specified SKU already exists.

500.description: Internal server error while adding product

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track shipment status of an order
get.description: Retrieve the tracking information for a given order by its unique orderId. Returns the current shipping status, estimated delivery date, and other relevant details.

example.message: No shipment tracking information found for the specified orderId.

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving tracking info

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Create a new user account in the system. The request body should contain user information including username, email, password, and other profile data. Returns the created user details upon success.

requestBody.description: User registration details including credentials and profile information.

example.message: User registration information is incomplete or invalid.
A user with the given email or username already exists.

500.description: Internal server error during user registration

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: The currency code for the prices, e.g., USD, EUR.

discount.description: Discount applied to this item (monetary value).

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount for this item.

price.description: Original price per unit of the product.

quantity.description: The number of units of the product.

currency.description: Currency code used for amounts in the cart.

items.description: List of items currently in the cart.

payableAmount.description: Total amount the user needs to pay after discounts.

totalAmount.description: Sum of original prices for all items before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied across all cart items.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to this cart in ISO 8601 format.

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning this cart.

discount.description: Discount applied to this order item.

finalPrice.description: Final price paid for this item after discount.

price.description: Original price per unit of the ordered product.

productId.description: Unique ID of the ordered product.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created (ISO 8601 format).

currency.description: Currency code used for the order amounts.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid for the order after discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order.

status.description: Current status of the order (e.g., Processing, Shipped).

totalAmount.description: Total original amount for the order before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last order update (ISO 8601 format).

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

amount.description: The total amount to be paid.

currency.description: The currency code of the payment amount, following ISO 4217 standard.

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the order related to this payment.

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway provider to process the payment.

paymentMethod.description: The method of payment used (e.g. credit_card, paypal).

amount.description: The amount that was processed in the payment.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the payment was created.

currency.description: Currency code used for this payment.

orderId.description: Identifier of the order related to this payment.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier assigned to this payment.

paymentMethod.description: Method used for the payment process.

status.description: Current status of the payment (e.g. success, failed, pending).

transactionId.description: Identifier of the transaction from the payment gateway.

gatewayResponse.description: Response message or status from the payment gateway.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier of the payment related to this webhook event.

status.description: Status update of the payment as sent by the gateway webhook.

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier from the payment gateway.

available.description: Indicates whether the product is currently available for purchase.

category.description: Category under which the product is listed.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price.

description.example: A high-quality wireless headphone with noise cancellation.

rating.description: Customer rating of the product (scale 1 to 5).

stock.description: Number of items available in stock.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase.

category.description: Category to which the product belongs.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created.

currency.description: Currency code for the price (ISO 4217 format).

description.example: A high-quality electronic device with multiple features.

price.description: Price of the product in the specified currency.

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product out of 5.

stock.description: Number of items of this product available in stock.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product was last updated.

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling the delivery.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last tracking update.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being tracked.

trackingId.description: Unique tracking identifier provided by the courier.

active.description: Indicates if the user account is currently active.

country.description: Country code or name of the user.

phone.description: User's phone number in international format.

userType.description: Type of user, e.g., admin, customer, guest.

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active.

country.description: Country where the user is located.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for user account creation.

phone.description: User's phone number in international format.

preferredCurrency.description: Preferred currency code of the user in ISO 4217 format.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user information was last updated.

userType.description: Role or type of user in the system.

path.description: Request path that caused the error

field.description: Name of the field causing the error
